name: com.narrativelayermanager.nlm
description: Preview your scenes at any story beat, quest flag, or game phase — without entering Play Mode. Scrub a timeline of narrative beats, detect binding conflicts, and compare beat-to-beat object diffs. Zero external dependencies.

samples.description: A complete three-act narrative scene with 8 bound objects, 5 beats, and pre-built conflicts to demonstrate the NLM workflow.
